description: Dialogue for Tharin Ironbeard offering the wolf hunting quest

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: Good timing. I've got work for you if you're willing. The wolf population has exploded this year - they're attacking our logging teams and making the roads dangerous. I need someone to thin out their numbers.

choices.text: How many wolves are we talking about?
I'm not interested in hunting wolves.

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: Kill at least five of them. That should send a message to the rest of the pack to stay clear of our territory. The wolves have been getting bolder - they're not just scavenging anymore, they're actively hunting near the camp.

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: Because you've proven yourself reliable with the supply run. I need someone I can trust to handle themselves in a fight. Wolves are dangerous - they hunt in packs, and they're smarter than you'd think. This isn't a job for some green recruit.

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: They roam the forests around Elder Moor. You'll find them east and north of the camp, especially near the game trails. Be careful - if you wound one and it flees, the rest of the pack will know you're hunting them. They'll come for you.

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: Keep your back to a tree or rock so they can't surround you. Wolves are fast and they'll try to flank. Block when they lunge, then strike while they're recovering. And don't chase wounded wolves - let them flee. You're thinning the pack, not trying to wipe them out completely.

choices.text: Good advice. I'll get it done.
On second thought, this is too dangerous.

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: 50 gold and two healing potions. Plus, you'll have proven you can handle yourself in combat. That opens doors for more dangerous - and more lucrative - work. Interested?

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: Good. Kill five wolves and come back here. And watch yourself - they're more dangerous than they look. If you get overwhelmed, retreat. No sense dying over a few pelts.

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: Keep at it. Every wolf you kill makes the roads safer for everyone.

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: Well done. The logging teams have already reported fewer sightings. Here's your payment - 50 gold and two healing potions. You've proven you can handle yourself in a real fight. I'll have more work for you soon.

nodes.speaker: Tharin Ironbeard
nodes.text: Suit yourself. If you change your mind, let me know. The wolves aren't going anywhere.
